entries.content: Evidence write idempotency fits as a pure local helper in temporal/change-state.ts and can be reused by disk state paths; compare stable evidence fields while ignoring recorded_at, then derive tdd_phase from red/green presence to avoid phase regression.
Changing Store.tasks.recordEvidence from Task to result metadata requires updating adv_run_test and target-store mocks; otherwise code that reads tdd_phase must use result.task.tdd_phase.
